positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: a close-up of a modern car center console with a metallic control surface, two cup holders, a rotary dial, a compact gear selector, black leather trim with red stitching, and a softly blurred dashboard in the background. Preserve the original aspect ratio, composition, shallow depth of field, objects, materials, and interior layout. The first frame is already a calm static product-like interior shot, not an active driving or gear-shifting moment. During the clip, a subtle cool reflection slowly glides across the brushed metallic console and cup-holder rims, then fades and settles by the final frames while all controls remain in place. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable drift with gentle parallax, minimal and elegant, keeping the console clearly visible. Add only soft visible motion in reflections, shadows, and tiny highlights on the leather stitching and dashboard surfaces. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, stable geometry, smooth temporal consistency, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: Do not add hands, do not shift the gear selector, do not rotate the dial, do not press buttons, do not add cups or drinks, do not open compartments, do not change the car interior, do not make the vehicle drive away, do not change the position or shape of the cup holders, console, dial, gear selector, stitching, dashboard, or seats, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden movement, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic materials, text artifacts, icon distortion, logo distortion.
